# GitHub Copilot / Codex

Leia e segue **`.github/AGENTS.md`** neste repositório (fonte canónica para todos os agentes).

Resumo obrigatório — diretrizes Karpathy:
- Think before coding; surface tradeoffs and ask when unclear
- Simplicity first; minimum code for the problem
- Surgical changes; match existing style; no drive-by refactors
- Goal-driven execution; define verifiable success criteria

Para detalhes completos: **`.github/AGENTS.md`**
